'''hahatha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wackaloon|wackaloon]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-h-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wackaloon|wackaloon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hahatha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæhæthæth|hæhæthæth]] || [[word:hæhæthæj|hæhæthæj]] || [[word:hæhæthæsh|hæhæthæsh]] || [[word:hæhæthæ|hæhæthæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hahahathath|hahahathath]] || [[word:hahahathaj|hahahathaj]] || [[word:hahahathash|hahahathash]] || [[word:hahahatha|hahahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hahathath|hahathath]] || [[word:hahathaj|hahathaj]] || [[word:hahathash|hahathash]] || [[word:hahatha|hahatha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hahafthath|hahafthath]] || [[word:hahafthaj|hahafthaj]] || [[word:hahafthash|hahafthash]] || [[word:hahafthaf|hahafthaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hahathatha|hahathatha]] || [[word:hahathaja|hahathaja]] || [[word:hahathasha|hahathasha]] || [[word:hahathaka|hahathaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hahathath|hahathath]] || [[word:hahathaj|hahathaj]] || [[word:hahathash|hahathash]] || [[word:hahatha|hahatha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hahathathal|hahathathal]] || [[word:hahathajal|hahathajal]] || [[word:hahathashal|hahathashal]] || [[word:hahathakal|hahathakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hahathathatha|hahathathatha]] || [[word:hahathajaja|hahathajaja]] || [[word:hahathashasha|hahathashasha]] || [[word:hahathaka|hahathaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hahathathan|hahathathan]] || [[word:hahathajan|hahathajan]] || [[word:hahathashan|hahathashan]] || [[word:hahathakan|hahathakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hahathathaoro|hahathathaoro]] || [[word:hahathajaoro|hahathajaoro]] || [[word:hahathashaoro|hahathashaoro]] || [[word:hahathakaoro|hahathakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c715ec1}}
